command:
cd ~/Documents/Projects/Hyo && python3 -c '
import json
with open("website/data/feed.json") as f:
    data = json.load(f)
# Show one nel report sections to check quality
for r in data.get("reports",[]):
    if "nel" in r.get("id","") and "2026-04-14" in r.get("id",""):
        print("=== " + r["id"] + " ===")
        print("Title: " + r.get("title","?"))
        s = r.get("sections",{})
        for k,v in s.items():
            if isinstance(v, str):
                print(k + ": " + v[:120])
            elif isinstance(v, list):
                print(k + ": " + str(v[:2])[:120])
        print()
        break
'
